title: leucanthemum leucolepis
intro: Leucanthemum leucolepis, also known as the moon daisy or white daisy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its white flowers and feathery foliage. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Leucanthemum leucolepis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
